sentences.target: Der Vertreter wartet schon am Eingang.

translations.de: Der Vertreter wartet schon am Eingang.
translations.en: The representative is already waiting at the entrance.
translations.es: El representante ya está esperando en la entrada.
translations.fr: Le représentant attend déjà à l’entrée.
translations.it: Il rappresentante sta già aspettando all’ingresso.
translations.ko: 영업 담당자가 이미 입구에서 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 业务代表已经在门口等着。
translations.yue: 嗰位代表已經喺入口等緊。
translations.pt: O representante já está na entrada.
translations.vi: Người đại diện đã chờ sẵn ở lối vào.
translations.nl: De vertegenwoordiger staat al bij de ingang te wachten.
translations.hu: A képviselő már a bejáratnál vár.
translations.hi: प्रतिनिधि पहले से ही प्रवेश द्वार पर इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο εκπρόσωπος περιμένει ήδη στην είσοδο.
translations.id: Perwakilan sudah menunggu di pintu masuk.
translations.ja: 担当者はもう入口で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a masculine nominative noun as the subject of the clause.
Common noun serving as the subject; masculine singular.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; predicate of the sentence.
Adverb expressing temporal aspect; modifies the verb 'wartet'.
Fused form of 'an' + 'dem'; functions as a preposition selecting a dative NP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'am' indicating location.

sentences.target: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Vertreter.

translations.de: Ich spreche kurz mit dem Vertreter.
translations.en: I’m talking briefly with the representative.
translations.es: Hablo un momento con el representante.
translations.fr: Je parle un instant avec le représentant.
translations.it: Parlo un attimo con il rappresentante.
translations.zh-Hans: 我和业务代表简单聊一下。
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện một chút với người đại diện.
translations.nl: Ik praat even met de vertegenwoordiger.
translations.uk: Я на хвильку поговорю з представником.
translations.hi: मैं प्रतिनिधि से थोड़ी देर बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω για λίγο με τον εκπρόσωπο.
translations.ja: 担当者と少し話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; predicate.
Adverb of manner modifying 'spreche'.
Preposition selecting a dative complement.
Definite article in dative case; determiner within the prepositional phrase headed by 'mit'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'mit' (dative).

sentences.target: Unsere Chefin schickt einen Vertreter vorbei.

translations.de: Unsere Chefin schickt einen Vertreter vorbei.
translations.en: Our boss is sending a representative over.
translations.es: Nuestra jefa va a enviar a un representante.
translations.fr: Notre patronne va envoyer un représentant.
translations.it: La nostra responsabile manda un rappresentante.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们老板派一位业务代表过来。
translations.yue: 我哋老闆會派個代表過嚟。
translations.ru: Наша начальница отправляет к нам представителя.
translations.pt: Nossa chefe vai mandar um representante.
translations.vi: Sếp của chúng tôi đang cử một người đại diện qua đây.
translations.nl: Onze baas stuurt een vertegenwoordiger langs.
translations.uk: Наша керівниця надсилає до нас представника.
translations.hu: A főnöknőnk küld ide egy képviselőt.
translations.hi: हमारी बॉस एक प्रतिनिधि को भेज रही है.
translations.el: Η προϊσταμένη μας στέλνει έναν εκπρόσωπο.
translations.nb: Sjefen vår sender over en representant.
translations.id: Bos kami mengirim seorang perwakilan ke sini.
translations.sv: Vår chef skickar hit en representant.
translations.ro: Șefa noastră trimite un reprezentant la noi.
translations.cs: Naše šéfová posílá k maς zástupce.
translations.da: Vores chef sender en repræsentant forbi.
translations.ja: うちの上司が担当者をこちらに送ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'Chefin' as subject.
Common noun, feminine; serves as the subject.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive predicate.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine; determiner of the direct object NP.
Common noun; direct object of 'schickt'.
Separable verb particle associated with 'schickt', forming the verb 'vorbeischicken' with directional nuance.

sentences.target: Der Vertreter erklärt mir die neuen Preise.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈtʁeːtɐ ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ̯ diː ˈnɔʏ̯ən ˈpʁaɪ̯zə/

translations.de: Der Vertreter erklärt mir die neuen Preise.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈtʁeːtɐ ɛʁˈklɛːʁt miːɐ̯ diː ˈnɔʏ̯ən ˈpʁaɪ̯zə/
translations.en: The representative is explaining the new prices to me.
translations.es: El representante me explica los nuevos precios.
translations.fr: Le représentant m’explique les nouveaux tarifs.
translations.it: Il rappresentante mi spiega i nuovi prezzi.
translations.ko: 영업 담당자가 새 가격을 설명해 주고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 业务代表在向我解释新的价格。
translations.yue: 代表同我解釋新嘅價錢。
translations.pt: O representante está me explicando os novos preços.
translations.he: הנציג מסביר לי את המחירים החדשים.
translations.vi: Người đại diện đang giải thích cho tôi về giá mới.
translations.nl: De vertegenwoordiger legt me de nieuwe prijzen uit.
translations.hu: A képviselő elmagyarázza nekem az új árakat.
translations.hi: प्रतिनिधि मुझे नए दाम समझा रहा है.
translations.el: Ο εκπρόσωπος μου εξηγεί τις νέες τιμές.
translations.nb: Representanten forklarer meg de nye prisene.
translations.id: Perwakilan menjelaskan harga baru kepada saya.
translations.sv: Representanten förklarar de nya priserna för mig.
translations.da: Repræsentanten forklarer mig de nye priser.
translations.ja: 担当者が私に新しい料金を説明しています。
